quote.label: Quote / Testimonial
quote.description: Pull quote, testimonial, or statement block with optional attribution, portrait image, and CTA. Three display modes: inline (default), featured, and statement.

slots.name: quote
slots.example: Maryland pushed me to think bigger.

slots.name: attribution
slots.description: Person or source of the quote.

slots.name: attribution-sub-text
slots.description: Title, affiliation, or secondary attribution line.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Layout variant. Omit for the default inline layout.

notes.featured: Larger display with optional image and enhanced styling — use for a hero-scale testimonial.
notes.statement: Prominent standalone quote, no image focus.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme for the quote container.

attrs.name: data-visual
attrs.description: Transparent removes the background; size-large increases quote text size.

attrs.name: data-feature-animation
attrs.description: Enables an animation on load. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

variants.featured: Hero-scale quote with optional portrait image.
variants.statement: Prominent standalone quote without an image anchor.

quote.horizontal_spacing: Wrap quote sections in `umd-layout-space-horizontal-normal` (1280px) — not `larger` (1320px). See RULES.md §12.
quote.notes: When a source has only a quotation and attribution (no full body copy), use umd-element-quote — not umd-element-pathway-highlight (which requires substantive text). See RULES.md §5.
